nasb.text: But the prudent answered, ‘No, there will not be enough for us and you too; go instead to the dealers and buy some for yourselves.’

esv.text: But the wise answered, saying, ‘Since there will not be enough for us and for you, go rather to the dealers and buy for yourselves.’

cnv.text: 聰明的回答：‘這些恐怕不夠我們大家用，不如你們自己到賣油的地方去買吧！’

ccb.text: “聪明的伴娘回答说，‘不行，我们的油不够大家用的，你们去油店买吧！’

csbs.text: “但那些聪明的回答说：‘不行，绝不够我们和你们用的。你们还是到卖油的那里去，为自己买吧。’
